revision.comment: [[:en:Wikipedia:Tools/Navigation_popups|Popups]]-assisted disambiguation from [[È]] to [[Grave accent]]
changed the layout
clean up (€ redirects to Euro symbol), Replaced: [[€]] → [[Euro sign|€]] using [[WP:AWB|AWB]]
New chart template based on template:familytree
Updated to use some non-userspace namespace
Updated to use new templates
Removed erroneous extra line
[[WP:UNDO|Undid]] revision 191486119 by [[Special:Contributions/80.178.164.61|80.178.164.61]] ([[User talk:80.178.164.61|talk]])
added support for custom rowspan and colspan
added support for another ten columns
revert, unkown error
should be right
use void instead of x0 since void is protected
Protected Template:Chart: [[Wikipedia:High-risk templates|Highly-visible template]] (over 1000 transclusions) (‎[edit=autoconfirmed] (indefinite) ‎[move=sysop] (indefinite))
workaround chrome bug. see [[Wikipedia:Village_pump_(technical)/Archive_124#Kings_of_Wales_family_trees]]
move align to css, lf after row
linebreak kills formatting when nested in wikitables
Modulized; everything should be working as expected; Module doesn't use some errors, because it's able to account for them
undo
fixed
use the right doc template
Self-Revert All my previous - I did not click save, so I don't know how 3 views of older versions got saved while using the preview page with template feature

Changed protection level for "[[Template:Chart]]": [[WP:HIGHRISK|high-risk]] template with 2000+ transclusions ([Edit=Require template editor access] (indefinite) [Move=Require template editor access] (indefinite))
Notifying of move discussion on [[Template talk:Chart#Requested move 24 February 2019 |Template talk:Chart]]
Removing notice of move discussion
Reaper Eternal moved page [[Template:Chart]] to [[Template:Tree chart]]: Per talk page requested move
Correcting code per recent requested move on talk page
Null edit to force server cache to update
Missing tfd tag
revision.text: <noinclude>{{Template for discussion/dated|action=|page=Tree chart|link=Wikipedia:Templates for discussion/Log/2020 March 22#Template:Tree chart|bigbox={{#invoke:Noinclude|noinclude|text=yes}}}}</noinclude><includeonly>{{#invoke:Tree chart|main}}</includeonly><noinclude>{{documentation}} </noinclude>

revision.comment: [[Wikipedia:Templates for discussion/Log/2020 March 22#Template:Family tree]] closed as merge ([[WP:XFDC|XFDcloser]])
39 revisions imported from [[:wikipedia:Template:Tree_chart]]

Text replacement - "[[Category:qq]]" to ""
Text replacement - "[[Category:New]]" to ""

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
Text replacement - "[[sn:" to "[[Category:sn_crud|TEST"

revision.comment: Text replacement - "</noinclude>↵<noinclude>" to ""
